title: neoboutonia africana var. mannii
intro: Neoboutonia africana var. mannii, also known as Mann's Neoboutonia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its large leaves and woody stems. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Neoboutonia africana var. mannii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
